Off Calendar Jan-21-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Leutza for Hollis Scarborough and Jo Ann Scarborough.

Mr. Leutza stated that he filed a declaration on January 9, 2015 and a copy of the first page of the inventory. The accounting petition was taken under submission.
